content.title: Global oil prices notch back-to-back rise, remain ‘tethered to the Hormuz narrative’
content.summary: Global oil prices Tuesday were on track to notch their largest two-day rise since mid-March, buoyed by further escalation in the U.S.-Iran conflict even as President Donald Trump backed away from his threat to impose a 20% fee on cargo shipped through the Strait of Hormuz.

content.title: ‘It’s heartbreaking’: My brother claimed Social Security at 70. He died from cancer after one payment. Why wait to claim?
content.summary: “I’ve always been a little skeptical of the government’s encouragement to delay claiming benefits.”

content.title: Officials are reportedly looking into Taco Bell, as source of parasite outbreak remains elusive
content.summary: Shares of Yum Brands were down nearly 4% on Tuesday.

content.title: Your paycheck is rising faster than prices for a change — but when will you feel the relief?
content.summary: Wage growth in June outpaced inflation, after falling behind during April and May.

content.title: Sky-high returns and earnings expectations could mean the end is near for this stock-market bull run
content.summary: Never since 1950 have the S&P 500’s price and earnings both been so far above the historical trend at one time, one strategist said.

content.title: ‘They are relentless’: A scammer is trying to change the email on my empty Robinhood account. What do they have to gain?
content.summary: “I’ve just been ignoring their attempts.”

content.title: ‘I’d hate to end up with an unexpected tax bill’: I’m 73 and still work full time. Can I avoid paying taxes on my Social Security benefits?
content.summary: “I’m actually earning more each week than I ever have before.”

content.title: I’m 67 with a $140,000 pension. Should I wait until 70 to claim Social Security so my wife gets more?
content.summary: “When I pass, all my retirement income is reduced to $30,000 a year.”

content.title: My husband and I are retired. Our financial adviser, who is in his 30s, called us ‘you guyses.’ Is that unprofessional?
content.summary: “I’m wondering whether I should ask to work with someone closer to our generation.”

content.title: Lindsey Graham died from a rare heart condition. Here’s how to know if you’re at risk.
content.summary: Aortic dissections are extremely rare; however, people with a family history or who have been diagnosed with certain genetic syndromes have an elevated risk
